free_text: Resonances in O-18(p,p)O-18 for E(p)=3.4-6.2 MeV.
The O-18 targets consisted of self-supporting Al(2)O(3)
films about 40 mug/cm**2 thick, 98% enriched in O-180
was used. A self-supporting non-enriched Al(2)O(3)
target was bombarded to obtain the background
The error is reported by authors on figure.
.The error is reported by authors in table
